issues.detail: The skill only demonstrates happy path examples and does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill specifies compatibility only for macOS and Linux, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Deploy Typesense in Docker and search a products collection
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented docker run with --api-key/--enable-cors/--data-dir, defines fields with facet:true and default_sorting_field, and demonstrates typo-tolerant search via q/query_by/filter_by/sort_by/facet_by — baseline omits facet config and exact CLI flags.

scenarios.name: Add geo search for nearby stores
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines a geopoint field and uses the exact Typesense filter_by 'location:(lat, lng, 10 km)' and sort_by 'location(lat, lng):asc' syntax — baseline gives generic geo guidance without the platform-specific filter expression.
